Clackmannan. Blazon: Welf rampant lion azure on canton argent on chief gules, saltire gules all on shield Or; crest: Welf or Gruffyd passant lion azure.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan於1340年出生在英國蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南時，他的父親Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan12歲，母親Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse23歲。他於1370年與Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1403年7月23日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan于1340年出生在英国苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南时，他的父亲Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan12岁，母亲Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse23岁。他于1370年与Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1403年7月23日在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan was born in 1340, in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan, was 12 and his mother, Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse, was 23. He married Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland in 1370, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 July 1403, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan est né en 1340, à Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland en 1370, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 juillet 1403, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan 1340 in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan 12 und seine Mutter Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse 23. Er hat 1370 in Schottland, United Kingdom Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Juli 1403 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan è nato il nel 1340 nel Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland nel 1370, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 luglio 1403, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannanが1340年にイギリススコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアクラクマナンで生まれた時，父Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannanは12歳，母Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouseは23歳であった。1370年にイギリススコットランドでIsabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1403年7月23日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan(이)가 1340년 영국 스코틀랜드 클랙먼아실르 클랙먼아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1370년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 7월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan nasceu em 1340, em Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland em 1370, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de julho de 1403, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan родился в 1340 г. в местности клаккманнан, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland в 1370 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 июля 1403 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan nació en 1340, en Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland en 1370, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de julio de 1403, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
